ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Category code of the company (e.g., advertising, web, cleantech) */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the company's profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the investor's profile */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the investor */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the investor */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the investor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that received the funding */,
  "funding_round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., series-a, series-b, series-c+) */,
  "funded_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the funding round was announced */,
  "funded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the funding round was announced */,
  "raised_amount_usd" INTEGER /* Amount raised in the funding round in USD */,
  "pre_money_valuation_usd" INTEGER /* Pre-money valuation of the company in USD */,
  "post_money_valuation_usd" INTEGER /* Post-money valuation of the company in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round that the investment belongs to */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor that made the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount_usd" INTEGER /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_details" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment detail */,
  "manualSort" INTEGER /* Manual sort value */,
  "Company" INTEGER /* ID of the company that received the investment */,
  "investor_permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the investor's profile */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_category_code" TEXT /* Category code of the investor */,
  "investor_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the investor */,
  "investor_state_code" TEXT /* State code of the investor */,
  "investor_region" TEXT /* Region of the investor */,
  "investor_city" TEXT /* City of the investor */,
  "funding_round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round */,
  "funded_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the funding round was announced */,
  "funded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the funding round was announced */,
  "raised_amount_usd" INTEGER /* Amount raised in the funding round in USD */,
  "gristHelper_Display2" INTEGER /* Helper display 2 value */,
  "Company_category_code" TEXT /* Category code of the company */,
  "Company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "Company_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "Company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_details_Company FOREIGN KEY ("Company") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment return */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment that the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment return was realized */,
  "return_amount_usd" INTEGER /* Amount of the investment return in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_returns_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_multiples" (
  "multiple_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation multiple */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that the valuation multiple belongs to */,
  "valuation_multiple" REAL /* Valuation multiple (e.g., revenue multiple, EBITDA multiple) */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation multiple was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multiple_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuation_multiples_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
